mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user (id, emp, email, name, role_id, status, last_login) VALUES (#{id}, #{emp}, #{email}, #{name}, #{roleId}, #{status}, #{lastLogin})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_user ORDER BY emp
SELECT emp, name FROM app_user WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY emp
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, role_id = #{roleId}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_credential SET salt = #{salt}, password_hash = #{passwordHash} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE app_user SET last_login = #{at} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_credential (user_id, salt, password_hash) VALUES (#{userId}, #{salt}, #{passwordHash})
